title: Cilium
description: Cilium documents installation material for Cilium in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the networking-stack class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 설치, cilium-cli, Helm으로 Cilium 설치하기, 테스트, and 삭제, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include cni, install, infrastructure, and networking, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / networking / cilium / install, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
